query: A long translated navigation label pushes the account button off-screen. Fix the shared header and verify text zoom.
reason: Intrinsic text sizing and shared responsive header behavior are explicit triggers.

query: This component preview is blank on narrow cards and becomes wider than the page in list view. Diagnose both modes.
reason: Preview surfaces with unstable dimensions are covered by the skill.

query: At 768px the filter rail and results both claim half the page, clipping every control. Please repair the breakpoint contract.
reason: A layout structure that fails at a breakpoint is a direct trigger.

query: Should our campaign use a serif or sans-serif logo?
reason: A logo preference has no responsive interface failure.

query: Add OAuth login to this API service.
Write release notes for the latest mobile app version.
reason: Release writing is not layout diagnosis.
